heading: Additional penalties
label: 964 Additional penalties
text: Any penalty imposed for violation of this subchapter shall be in addition to, and not in lieu of, any civil or administrative penalty or sanction authorized by law.
notes: Effective DateSection effective on first day of seventh calendar month that begins after , see 1105(a) of , set out as a under .Oct. 26, 1970Pub. L. 91–513section 951 of this title
